## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential role for Sarah KB at GrowthX, exploring her background and fit with company needs.](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sarah has a unique background combining data engineering, technical content creation, and marketing leadership](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX needs someone to build repeatable processes for technical content and go-to-market operations](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential hybrid role as managing director for technical accounts + functional responsibilities in go-to-market engineering](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Sarah's Professional Background

  - [Data engineering roles at PerPay and other companies](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Transitioned to marketing/growth at Prefect, scaling team from 1 to 8 people](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
  - [Experience with content creation, SEO, lead generation, and integrated campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=2468.0)
  - [Strong technical background combined with marketing expertise](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=3014.0)

### GrowthX's Business Model and Strategy

  - [Services-first approach allows extracting more value and learning faster](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Building internal tools/platforms that could become products later](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Projecting 76-79% gross margin this year, 91% next year](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Inspired by companies like Tiny, Amazon AWS, and DBT Labs](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

### Potential Role at GrowthX

  - [Hybrid role: Managing director for technical accounts + functional responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=3301.0)
  - [Focus on building repeatable processes for technical content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=3129.0)
  - [Go-to-market engineering: automating/streamlining pre/post-sales, data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=3324.0)
  - [Leverage Sarah's technical background and marketing experience](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=3175.0)

### Sarah's Career Motivations

  - [Wants to "build a machine to achieve a goal" - find repeatable, scalable processes](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=3028.0)
  - [Values learning opportunities and being part of a team](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=2178.0)
  - [Not currently looking to start own company, but has entrepreneurial interests](https://fathom.video/share/zPxEkqwqxjF2sxwHf84az5-YhJMqzzYR?tab=summary&timestamp=3241.0)
